name: ASRock N100M Micro-ATX Motherboard - Intel Quad-Core Processor N100 3.4GHz - Supports 1 DDR4 DIMM - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 (x2 mode) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock N100M Micro-ATX Motherboard - Intel Quad-Core Processor N100
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel N100 processors with DDR4 support and integrated graphics outputs.
